import asyncio, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, ''''src''''\)
from shared.table_extractor import TableExtractor
from shared.ai_api_client import AIAPIClient

async def test_search_api_gemini\(\):
    print\(''''[TEST] Search API \(8K tokens/page\) → Gemini\\n''''\)
    client = AIAPIClient\(\)
    extractor = TableExtractor\(client\)
    
    # Test the new strategy
    result = await extractor._try_search_api_extraction\(
        url=''''https://fortune.com/ranking/fortune500/'''',
        table_name=''''Fortune 500 Companies'''',
        expected_columns=[''''Rank'''', ''''Company'''', ''''Revenue'''', ''''Industry''''],
        estimated_rows=100,
        max_tokens=8000
    \)
    
    print\(f''''[RESULT]''''\)
    print\(f''''  Success: {result[""success""]}''''\)
    print\(f''''  Rows: {len\(result[""rows""]\)}''''\)
    print\(f''''  Complete: {result[""extraction_complete""]}''''\)
    
    if result.get\(''''error''''\):
        print\(f''''  Error: {result[""error""]}''''\)
    
    if result[''''rows'''']:
        print\(f''''\\n[SAMPLE - First 3 rows]''''\)
        for i, row in enumerate\(result[''''rows''''][:3], 1\):
            print\(f''''  {i}. {json.dumps\(row\)}''''\)

asyncio.run\(test_search_api_gemini\(\)\)
")

import asyncio, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''''src''''\)
from shared.ai_api_client import AIAPIClient

async def test\(\):
    client = AIAPIClient\(\)
    response = await client.call_structured_api\(
        prompt=''''What is 3+3?'''',
        schema={''''type'''': ''''object'''', ''''properties'''': {''''answer'''': {''''type'''': ''''string''''}}},
        model=''''deepseek-v3.2'''',
        max_tokens=100
    \)
    print\(f''''Model used: {response.get\(""model_used""\)}''''\)
    if ''''response'''' in response:
        extracted = client.extract_structured_response\(response[''''response''''], ''''test''''\)
        print\(f''''Answer: {extracted.get\(""answer""\)}''''\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
